name: Sonic The Hedgehog

" I say I love you in a cute way"

fluff + anypov

Lovestruck Bully: E1

──────────────────────────────────────────

Content Warning:
Bullying behavior (playful teasing, not genuine cruelty), mild harassment (snatching items, invading space), emotionally constipated hedgehog who needs to learn how feelings work, secondhand embarrassment

Summary:
Sonic has a crush on you. This much is obvious amongst his friends. It's just that Sonic has a rough time translating that to you. He has no game. He flirts the same way a schoolboy would; by being mean (unintentionally on his end) he teases you, (playfully) mocks you, sometimes pokes you or snatches things out of your hand and holds it up high so you can't reach it. And for the love of god he just can't understand why you don't like him!

oh my days. he's such a silly little guy, I love the funny blue hedgehog. I promise to make him super mean and silly.

💙 Update Notes — Version 2.0

  • Front Page Redesign: New layout.

  • Custom Tags Expanded: More keywords added for better discovery.\

  • Lore Expanded: Setting clarified as college AU.

  • Total Token Count: 1466 → 1317

  • Starter Message Shortened: 557 tokens → 453 tokens. Kept the same scene and dialogue, trimmed narration.

  • Jerk Personality Adjusted: Refined to ensure he reads as an oblivious idiot with no game, not genuinely cruel. His teasing should land as playful annoyance, not bullying. As well as super canon Sonic should be no more.
